name: Get a book from Book Detail View and Return from Book Detail View (IOS)
fullName: Books transactions in Palace Bookshelf: Get a book from Book Detail View and Return from Book Detail View (IOS)

steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  I search for 'Flower Fables' and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
When  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
And  Click DELETE action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains GET action button on book details screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get a book from Book Detail View and Return from Book Detail View (IOS)
